steps.command: if [[ "advisory" == "strict" ]]; then ./scripts/validate_host_network_tuning.sh; else ./scripts/validate_host_network_tuning.sh || echo '[host-preflight] advisory mode: continuing despite host tuning warnings'; fi
steps.name: Host kernel network preflight

steps.command: unset MOHAWK_ACCELERATOR_BACKEND MOHAWK_GRADIENT_FORMAT || true; make production-readiness
steps.name: Build + tests + strict auth smoke

steps.command: unset MOHAWK_API_AUTH_MODE MOHAWK_API_TOKEN_FILE MOHAWK_API_ENFORCE_ROLES MOHAWK_API_BRIDGE_ALLOWED_ROLES MOHAWK_API_HYBRID_ALLOWED_ROLES || true; cd sdk/python && python3 -m pytest tests/test_client.py
steps.name: Python SDK regression

steps.command: export MOHAWK_ACCELERATOR_BACKEND="auto"; export MOHAWK_GRADIENT_FORMAT="int8"; "/workspaces/Sovereign-Mohawk-Proto/scripts/docker-compose-wrapper.sh" up -d orchestrator tpm-metrics prometheus grafana ipfs && "/workspaces/Sovereign-Mohawk-Proto/scripts/docker-compose-wrapper.sh" up -d node-agent-1 node-agent-2 node-agent-3 && "/workspaces/Sovereign-Mohawk-Proto/scripts/docker-compose-wrapper.sh" up -d pyapi-metrics-exporter
steps.name: Boot observability + control plane stack
